results.title: June 12: Abiola was not Poisoned – Abdulsalami Abubakar Opens Up
results.description: Former Military Head of State, General Abdulsalami Abubakar, has dismissed long-standing claims that the presumed winner of the June 12, 1993 presidential election, Chief Moshood Kashimawo Olawale Abiola, was poisoned in detention. Abdulsalami made the clarification in his autobiography, Call of Duty, one of three books publicly presented in Abuja as part of events marking ... The post June 12: Abiola was not Poisoned – Abdulsalami Abubakar Opens Up appeared first on Politics Nigeria .
